name: Solar-Harvesting Smart Tags
blurb: RFID tags powered entirely by embedded perovskite cells, eliminating batteries forever.

name: Reactor Asset Mesh
blurb: RFID sensor networks embedded throughout modular reactors for real-time component health tracking.

name: Frictionless Gene Delivery
blurb: Superfluid carrier medium transports therapeutic genes into cells without membrane damage.

name: Zero-Loss Ion Conduit
blurb: Superfluid channels shuttle lithium iron phosphate ions with no resistive energy loss.

name: Synaptic Foundation Chip
blurb: Foundation model weights compiled directly onto neuromorphic silicon for milliwatt inference.

name: Quantum-Classical Hybrid Reasoner
blurb: Foundation model offloads combinatorial search steps to a co-located quantum processor.

name: Planetary Climate Architect
blurb: Foundation model simulates and optimizes centuries-long terraforming intervention sequences.

name: Aerogel Formulation Oracle
blurb: Foundation model predicts novel aerogel nanopore architectures exceeding current insulation records.

name: Carbon Capture Optimizer
blurb: Foundation model continuously redesigns sorbent materials and process flows to minimize capture cost.

name: Nanobot Swarm Coordinator
blurb: Intelligent agents govern billions of nanobots as a distributed autonomous repair system.

name: Adaptive Rail Traffic Brain
blurb: Intelligent agent network orchestrates maglev trains across a continent in real time.

name: Closed-Loop Neural Interface
blurb: Intelligent agent reads EEG signals and responds with tailored stimulation within milliseconds.

name: Liquid Biopsy Sentinel
blurb: Autonomous agent monitors circulating tumor DNA streams and flags anomalies before symptoms emerge.

name: Dyson Construction Overseer
blurb: Self-directing agent fleet manages megastructure assembly around a star with minimal human input.

name: Autonomous Bioprocess Controller
blurb: Intelligent agent steers living bioreactor cultures toward target molecule yields in real time.

name: Dermal Glucose Nanosensor
blurb: Nanoscale electrochemical probes embedded in skin measure glucose without any patch or wire.

name: Molecular Carbon Sieve
blurb: Engineered nanoporous structures selectively bind CO₂ molecules from air at near-perfect efficiency.

name: Oncogenomic Triage AI
blurb: AI interprets liquid biopsy data to rank cancer subtypes and recommend treatment within minutes.

name: Orbital Intelligence Grid
blurb: AI inference distributed across satellite constellations, bringing computation to where data is generated.

name: Phenotype Wearable Tracker
blurb: Wearable sensors detect clonal-cell drift in real time, alerting clinicians to rejuvenation anomalies.

name: Nuclear-Powered Maglev Grid
blurb: Small fission plants co-located at maglev stations provide dedicated zero-carbon traction power.

name: Fission-Driven Vactrain
blurb: Nuclear reactor powers vacuum tube pumps and linear motors for intercontinental freight at speed.

name: Geothermal Maglev Spine
blurb: Geothermal baseload powers elevated maglev corridors drilled through geologically active terrain.

name: Earth-Heat Neurofeedback Spa
blurb: Geothermal warmth modulates EEG-guided relaxation environments for deep therapeutic brain states.

name: Geothermal Biomarker Lab
blurb: Deep-earth heat drives continuous liquid biopsy processing in remote off-grid clinics.

name: Stellar Tap Architecture
blurb: Geothermal drilling principles scaled to harvest a star's subsurface convection before full Dyson enclosure.

name: Hydrothermal Biofoundry
blurb: Geothermal heat and mineral-rich vent water feed engineered microbe cultures producing industrial chemicals.

name: Solar-Fax Archive Node
blurb: Perovskite-powered fax terminals let off-grid clinics transmit medical records without the electricity grid.

name: Reactor Documentation Hub
blurb: Hardened fax links serve as fail-safe document channels inside electromagnetic-shielded modular reactors.

name: Sodium Crypto Settlement Layer
blurb: Sodium-ion grid-storage banks underwrite stablecoin reserves with provable physical energy backing.

name: Neuromorphic Gene Circuit Emulator
blurb: Spike-based hardware simulates genetic regulatory networks millions of times faster than software.

name: Fullerene Synaptic Memory
blurb: Buckminsterfullerene junctions act as synaptic weights in ultra-dense neuromorphic memory arrays.

name: Spike-Coded Therapy Planner
blurb: Neuromorphic chip encodes patient genomics as spike trains to select optimal gene therapy vectors.

name: Spiking Storage Controller
blurb: Neuromorphic logic manages hard-drive head scheduling, cutting seek energy by learning platter patterns.

name: Plasma Instability Predictor
blurb: Neuromorphic chip learns fusion plasma turbulence signatures and fires corrective coil pulses in microseconds.

name: Tether-Integrated Solar Ribbon
blurb: Perovskite photovoltaic film woven into the space elevator cable harvests solar energy during ascent.

name: Orbital Reactor Lift System
blurb: Space elevator delivers prefabricated SMR modules to orbital energy platforms without rocket fuel.

name: Epigenetic Fitness Wearable
blurb: Wearable reads sweat biomarkers to infer real-time gene expression and personalize training loads.

name: Graphene Levitation Rail

name: Solar-Charged Transit Corridor
blurb: Perovskite panels lining maglev guideways generate the traction power the trains consume.

name: Passenger AR Navigation Layer

name: Holographic Maglev HUD

name: Transit Interpreter Kiosk
blurb: Machine translation terminals embedded in maglev stations give travelers real-time spoken guidance in any language.

name: Ambulatory MRI Patch
blurb: Wearable low-field MRI array worn on the torso continuously images soft-tissue organs during daily life.

name: Glycemic Response Robot

name: Predictive Glucose Network
blurb: Neural network trained on CGM streams forecasts hypoglycemic events up to 60 minutes ahead.

name: Expert Endocrine Router
blurb: Mixture-of-experts model routes each CGM reading to a specialist sub-network for diet, stress, or illness.

name: Transit Metabolic Monitor
blurb: CGM data streams to vactrain onboard systems, adjusting cabin food dispensing to passenger glucose levels.

name: Sodium-Powered CGM Patch

name: Graphene Pressure Hull Liner

name: Biometric VR Body Mirror

name: Biopsy Harvest Robot

name: Carbon-Fixing Crop Edit

name: Photonic Quantum Bus

name: Adaptive Biometric Gatekeeper
blurb: Mixture-of-experts model routes each biometric signal to the specialist best calibrated for that trait.

name: Fullerene Charge-Transport Layer
blurb: C₆₀ molecules serve as electron-extraction layers in perovskite solar cells, boosting efficiency further.

name: Fullerene Radiation Shield
blurb: Buckminsterfullerene coatings on SMR vessel walls absorb and scatter neutron flux.

name: Distributed Brain-State Grid
blurb: Multi-agent system fuses EEG readings from thousands of subjects to map population cognitive states.

name: Low-Energy Fusion Cell
blurb: Hypothetical cold fusion reactions charge sodium-ion cells by transmuting hydrogen in an electrolyte bath.

name: Gene-Integrated Limb

name: Long-Life Bionic Limb

name: Reactor Skin Solar Array

name: Quantum Relay Constellation

blurb: Arrays of small modular reactors supply the sustained megawatts needed to heat and thicken a thin planetary atmosphere.

name: Vactrain Ticketing Ledger
blurb: Blockchain records every seat reservation and cargo manifest for the vactrain network immutably.

name: Vector Routing Ensemble

name: Mobile Gene Clinic

name: Longitudinal Biopsy Archive

name: Ambient Language Coach
